title: [release-1.3] Bump skopeo v1.3.1, c/storage v1.31.3, c/common v0.38.11
body:
As the title says.  Bump Skopeo to v1.3.1, c/storage to v1.31.3, and c/common to v0.38.11 in preparation for RHEL 8.4.0.2

Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

comments.body: This probably needs parts of commit 93b819a766c64643cd9b35a4e4a6fd974c3dbd31  at least — maybe referring to the new branch instead of `main` so that validations only happen against the new contents of a PR, but just keeping `main` might work well enough.
Gack, managed to get dueling PR's up rather than updating this one.  Closing.
